title: Death by PowerPoint
description: A full-featured HTML5 presentation on avoiding common PowerPoint mistakes — built with custom animation engine, branching audio, and an interactive quiz. *WARNING* Has strobe-like effects which can trigger reactions in some people.
label: INTERACTIVE PRESENTATION

title: How To Make A Pizza
description: An interactive HTML5 training presentation on pizza-making — animated bullet reveals, a data table, and a three-question review quiz.
label: INTERACTIVE TRAINING

title: Derek and Jennifer
description: A fun little promotional presentation for The Write Method, a structured process for teaching the writintg of essays.
label: PROMOTIONAL PRESENTATION
